# PRD-to-tasks dry-run notes (eval 4)

- This is a dry-run draft using the prd-to-tasks skill, following SKILL.md exactly.
- The PRD is backend-only: no UI, only API, worker, persistence, and metrics.
- A new parent tracker is required (source is raw PRD, not an existing issue).
- All issue numbers and IDs are placeholders.
- Each child issue is a thin, vertical slice: persistence, replay API, metrics.
- Acceptance criteria, verification, and queue position are explicit per template.
- No GitHub mutations are performed; this is a draft for review.
